action_set_definitions.name: get_power_system_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current status of the Battery Backup System (BBS) and technician status.

action_set_definitions.name: get_technician_eta
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the estimated time of arrival (ETA) for the repair technician in seconds.

action_set_definitions.name: get_traffic_data
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current traffic state including lane queues and phase info.

action_set_definitions.name: set_load_shedding_level
action_set_definitions.description: Adjusts the power consumption of the intersection to extend battery life.

level.description: NONE: Full operation; FLASHING: Reduced power; MINIMAL: Only critical sensors active.

action_set_definitions.name: manage_power_hardware
action_set_definitions.description: Executes hardware-level switches for bypass and generator connection.

command.description: The specific hardware interaction to perform.

action_set_definitions.name: set_traffic_control_mode
action_set_definitions.description: Sets the operational mode of the traffic controller (e.g., standard cycling or emergency mode).

mode.description: Operational mode for the signal phases.

state_description.step_count: Total number of simulation steps elapsed.
state_description.current_phase_id: The ID of the currently active traffic light phase (e.g., 'NS_GREEN', 'EW_GREEN').
state_description.lane_queues: Current number of vehicles waiting in each lane (North, South, East, West).
state_description.arrival_rates: Average number of vehicles arriving per step for each direction.
state_description.elapsed_phase_time: Seconds elapsed since the current phase started.
